title: MultiSkill
intro: MultiSkill lets you learn passive and active skills from **any retail class** in the game, as well as exclusive **Custom Skills** unique to Kairos. Skills are organised by class and grouped into progression tiers — the higher the tier, the stronger the skill and the rarer the material required.

figure.alt: MultiSkill panel showing retail classes and custom skills
figure.caption: The MultiSkill panel — retail classes listed in red, Custom Skills highlighted at the bottom.

costRule.label: Cost Rule
costRule.body:
**First time learning a skill:** Adena + Class Stone + SP
**Upgrading an existing skill:** Adena + SP only — no stone needed.

tables.title: Retail Classes
tables.preText: All retail classes are available and grouped by their class-change tier. Each tier requires a specific **Class Stone** to unlock the first level of any skill in that group. Stones drop from monsters in the corresponding farming zones.

tables.title: Custom Skills
tables.preText: At the bottom of the MultiSkill panel sits the **Custom Skills** section — a set of exclusive skills available only on Kairos. These follow the same learning pattern as retail skills but use a rarer material obtained in higher-level zones.

cells: Class Stone V — drops in higher-level farming zones
Supported — use the standard Lineage 2 skill enchantment system

infoBoxes.label: Example
infoBoxes.body: Want to learn the Orc Shaman *Weapon Mastery* skill? It's a starting-class skill — grab a **Class Stone I** from a low-level farming zone, open MultiSkill, find the Orc class, and learn it. Subsequent level upgrades cost Adena + SP only.

infoBoxes.label: Hint
infoBoxes.body: All Custom Skills are **passive** — they work automatically once learned with no activation needed. They can also be **enchanted** using the standard L2 skill enchantment system, making them significantly stronger at higher enchant levels.
